title: Positive flow: Navigating through posts
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Scroll through the feed to view all posts. | Click on "Read more..." link for Post 1. | Click on "Read more..." link for Post 2. | Click on "Read more..." link for Post 3.
expected_result: The app navigates to the detailed view of Post 1. | The app navigates to the detailed view of Post 2. | The app navigates to the detailed view of Post 3.

title: Negative flow: Clicking on non-existent elements
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Scroll through the feed to view all posts. | Click on a non-existent "Read more..." link. | Click on a non-existent "Read more..." link.
expected_result: The app displays an error message or navigates back to the previous screen. | The app displays an error message or navigates back to the previous screen.

title: Boundary/Validation: Like button functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Click on the like button for Post 1. | Click on the like button for Post 2. | Click on the like button for Post 3.
expected_result: The number of likes for Post 1 increases by 1. | The number of likes for Post 2 increases by 1. | The number of likes for Post 3 increases by 1.

title: Usability: Commenting on posts
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Click on the comment button for Post 1. | Enter a comment and submit. | Click on the comment button for Post 2. | Enter a comment and submit. | Click on the comment button for Post 3. | Enter a comment and submit.
expected_result: A new comment is added to Post 1. | A new comment is added to Post 2. | A new comment is added to Post 3.

title: Accessibility: Screen reader interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Enable screen reader mode. | Navigate to Post 1 using the screen reader. | Navigate to Post 2 using the screen reader. | Navigate to Post 3 using the screen reader.
expected_result: The screen reader correctly reads out the content of Post 1. | The screen reader correctly reads out the content of Post 2. | The screen reader correctly reads out the content of Post 3.

title: Usability: Bottom navigation button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the main feed screen. | Click on the red circular button with the pen icon at the bottom of the screen. | Click on the red circular button with the pen icon at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The app navigates to the post creation screen. | The app navigates to the post creation screen.
